text.tspan: JavaScript (and TypeScript) for Excel That Just Works
application logic over possibly auxiliary UI logic.
External network requests are disabled and
file access is restricted to reduce security risks.
Webcellar is an open source Office Add-In for
Microsoft Excel that lets developers easily enhance
spreadsheets with custom JavaScript and TypeScript.
In practice, this simplifies the development of many
advanced Excel applications, such as forecasting, risk,
simulation, decision and artificial intelligence (AI) models.
As an end result, developers can deliver meaningful
outcomes faster while preserving a familiar user
